scenarios.name: Worker stop during processing
scenarios.description: Validates that an interrupted worker can be detected and the work item can be recovered safely.
scenarios.expectedRecoveryBehavior: Lease expiration, heartbeat loss detection, and safe requeue/resume behavior are observed.

scenarios.name: Transient target API failure
scenarios.description: Validates retry, backoff, and eventual success/failure classification for target API instability.
scenarios.expectedRecoveryBehavior: Retry policy is applied without duplicate durable side effects.
